2:
Geva declares your workmanship satisfactory─for a jobbing leatherworker. She rewards you with an amateur's awl and reminds you to work hard if you wish to rise from obscurity and become a famous <If(PlayerParameter(4))>craftswoman<Else/>craftsman</If>.

※The next leatherworker quest will be available from Geva upon reaching level 10.
